etymology.description: 女(女) (nǚ, "woman") + 里(里) (lǐ) = woman of a specific household -> "wife of a younger brother"
etymology.interpretation: The character 娌(lǐ) combines 女(女) (nǚ, "woman"), indicating a female, with 里(里) (lǐ), which provides the phonetic component. This suggests a woman related by marriage, identifying her specifically as someone connected to a younger brother.
